form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (21.11) in a Mix 2/3, finishing a 16 length seventh. Has three wins and three placings from eight starts from the draw. Expected to go close.

form.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. Most recent effort finished 6th over 350m at this track beaten 2 lengths (20.58) behind Ida Bale in a Mix 2/3 on April 10. Look for improvement. Not out of it.
